name: blocklayer
description: BlockLayer is a local-first Minecraft circle and oval blueprint builder with row segments, center guides, block counts, PNG export, print output, and share links.

scripts.typecheck:geometry: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --outDir .audit-dist src/lib/geometry/*.ts tests/geometry.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck:test && node .audit-dist/tests/geometry.test.js && node .audit-dist/tests/export.test.js && node tests/ui-smoke.test.mjs
